typography.rules: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Always use Cormorant Garamond for main sections to give a fashion-editorial vibe. Use Space Mono for technical details like skills or overlines to bridge the developer/space theme.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding.

grid_modes.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (For Skills/Experience)
grid_modes.asymmetrical: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-12 (For Fashion/Space Galleries)

motion_and_3d.hero_mechanics: The 3D avatar is the centerpiece. It must be rendered using a full-screen fixed or sticky canvas. Use @react-three/drei's ScrollControls or GSAP ScrollTrigger to tie the avatar's position, rotation, and animation state to the scroll progress.
motion_and_3d.scroll_behavior: Implement Lenis for smooth scroll to make the 3D transitions cinematic.

avatar_states_per_section.Hero: Floating gracefully in the center, looking directly at the user.
avatar_states_per_section.About: Moves to the left side of the screen, subtle ambient breathing.
avatar_states_per_section.Skills: Moves to the right, 'interacting' with floating 3D tech icons or typing.
avatar_states_per_section.Experience: Centered but scaled down, walking or standing confidently.
avatar_states_per_section.Contact: Looking towards the contact form, subtle waving on hover.

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Massive typography 'MANSI PATEL'. Subtitle: 'Full Stack Cloud Engineer'. 3D Avatar positioned in the center. Use a subtle noise texture overlay.

sections.name: About
sections.layout: Split layout. Text on right, avatar on left.
sections.content: Story connecting Mumbai to Regina, blending technical cloud architecture with a love for fashion and space exploration.

sections.name: Skills
sections.content: Grouped by Cloud (AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform), Backend (Spring Boot, Node.js), Frontend (React, 3D). Use Space Mono for tags.

sections.name: Experience
sections.content: Omit YMCA and Guac Mexi Grill. Focus on tech roles. Use glassmorphism cards for entries.

sections.name: Projects
sections.layout: Large cinematic cards with hover reveal.
sections.content: Dark images that brighten on hover. High-contrast typography.

sections.name: Travel & Space Gallery
sections.content: Mix of space aesthetic and personal travel. Use Framer Motion for parallax scrolling.

sections.name: Style/Fashion
sections.content: Overlapping images, large serif pull-quotes. Extremely generous white (negative) space.

sections.name: Contact
sections.content: Customized Shadcn input fields. Must save to DB.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). 1px border-white/20. Hover state: bg-white text-black. Use framer-motion for smooth fill.
components.cards: Minimalist. bg-[#121212] or transparent with border-white/[0.08]. Inner padding p-8.
components.forms: Use pure HTML/Tailwind customized to match the brand. Inputs should have transparent backgrounds, bottom border only (border-b border-white/20), focus:border-white.

travel_and_space.description: Deep space galaxy background for ambient sections

fashion_editorial.description: Editorial fashion shot for style section
Abstract glossy texture for fashion section accents

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing.convention: Use kebab-case, role-based identifiers. Example: data-testid='hero-contact-button', data-testid='about-section-container', data-testid='contact-form-submit'.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files, NOT .tsx files. Write all React code in standard .js/.jsx.
Install required dependencies: yarn add @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei framer-motion @studio-freight/react-lenis lucide-react
Use a placeholder <mesh> (like a capsule or basic loaded GLTF) for the 3D avatar that can easily be swapped out later. Assign it data-testid='3d-avatar-placeholder'.
Ensure the 3D Canvas is rendering behind the DOM content but allows pointer events to pass through where necessary, or place DOM overlays explicitly on top.
Do NOT center everything. Use asymmetrical layouts, especially in the Experience and Gallery sections.
Maintain strict adherence to the Typography and Color scale defined here.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for layouts and custom forms; avoid overusing Shadcn card components to keep the layout feeling art-directed rather than template-like.
Remember to omit YMCA and Guac Mexi Grill from the experience section.
